stories.title: Follow live: Colombia, Switzerland battle for fina...
Messi saves Argentina in dramatic win over Egypt
stories.summary: Lionel Messi scored in a record sixth straight World Cup knockout match to help Argentina reach the quarterfinals with a stunning late comeback to beat Egypt 3-2 in Atlanta.

stories.title: Sources: Lakers still pursuing free agent Kuminga
stories.summary: The Lakers continue to pursue unrestricted free agent wing Jonathan Kuminga, but they have not yet given him an enticing enough offer to commit, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Late Cowboys' player Kneeland diagnosed with CTE
stories.summary: Former Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland has been posthumously diagnosed with CTE.

stories.title: U.S. loss sets mark for most-watched soccer game
stories.summary: The United States game against Belgium in the round of 16 at the FIFA World Cup set another record as the most-watched soccer telecast in U.S. history, Fox said after preliminary ratings came out Tuesday.
